sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24481" key="D.H.naio/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δηναιότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24481.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">long life,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:201" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">201</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
